hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -q '\.py$' && echo "$file" | grep -q 'orchestrator'; then cd /Users/seanburdges/Dev/InGENeer/orchestrator && ruff format --quiet "$file" 2>/dev/null && ruff check --fix --quiet "$file" 2>/dev/null; fi

file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; schema='/Users/seanburdges/Dev/InGENeer/schemas/cad_intent_envelope.schema.json'; models='/Users/seanburdges/Dev/InGENeer/orchestrator/src/ingenieer/models.py'; if [ "$file" = "$schema" ] || [ "$file" = "$models" ]; then schema_ver=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open('$schema'))['properties']['schemaVersion']['const'])" 2>/dev/null); model_ver=$(grep -oP 'INTENT_SCHEMA_VERSION.*?"\K[^"]+' "$models" 2>/dev/null || grep -o 'schemaVersion.*Literal\[.\"[^\"]*' "$models" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$schema_ver" ] && [ -n "$model_ver" ] && [ "$schema_ver" != "$model_ver" ]; then echo "WARNING: Schema version mismatch! JSON=$schema_ver vs models.py=$model_ver — update both together per LAYERED_PRACTICE_PLAYBOOK.md" >&2; fi; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.env($|\.)' && ! echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q '.example'; then echo 'BLOCK: .env files with credentials cannot be edited. Use .env.example.' >&2; exit 2; fi
